entry.title: NURME Natural Deodorant Lemon and Eucolyptus 80g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Deodorant
Price: 10.90

The essential oils contained in deodorants have odor-neutralizing properties and, in addition, the baking soda in deodorants prevents the spread of odorous bacteria. Nurme deodorants do not contain clay, which would make the deodorant crumbly, so you do not have to worry about unpleasant crumbling pieces. Also, the deodorant does not leave the underarms greasy, instead, it leaves them feeling is dry and secure.
  • aluminum-free
  • do not contain synthetic dyes or fragrances
  • paraben-free
  • “zero waste” – in addition to the deodorant itself, the packaging that is made out of cardboard, is also environmentally friendly
  • ensures the natural functioning of the body
100% NATURAL and 100% CRUELTY-FREE

How to use: Remove the cap and squeeze the bottom of the tube, so a few centimeters of the deodorant stick comes out. If the stick does not want to move in the tube, hold it in your hand and warm it a little, you can move the tube around in your hands. This will warm up the deodorant and unstick it from the sides of the tube, so it starts moving in the package. If the stick tends to sink back to the bottom, squeeze it back up and hold it in place with your fingers placed under the stick.

Always apply the deodorant to clean, washed, dry skin. Place the stick on warm skin for a few seconds to soften it and then rub it all over the armpit. Don’t forget that less is more – a thicker layer doesn’t mean longer protection.

Allow the deodorant to dry and absorb for a few minutes before dressing. Then you are ready to continue your day.

Ingredients: Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beewax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Citrus Limon (Lemon) Peel Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus (Eucalyptus) Leaf Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Citral *, Linalool*, Limonene*, *Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NURME Natural Deodorant Lavender and Sage 80g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Deodorant
Price: 10.90

The essential oils contained in deodorants have odor-neutralizing properties and, in addition, the baking soda in deodorants prevents the spread of odorous bacteria. Nurme deodorants do not contain clay, which would make the deodorant crumbly, so you do not have to worry about unpleasant crumbling pieces. Also, the deodorant does not leave the underarms greasy, instead, it leaves them feeling is dry and secure.

Lavender essential oil is known for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties and will make your armpits smell pleasant. Sage essential oil has antiperspirant properties.
  • aluminum-free
  • do not contain synthetic dyes or fragrances
  • paraben-free
  • “zero waste” – in addition to the deodorant itself, the packaging that is made out of cardboard, is also environmentally friendly
  • ensures the natural functioning of the body
100% NATURAL and 100% CRUELTY-FREE
How to use: Remove the cap and squeeze the bottom of the tube, so a few centimeters of the deodorant stick comes out. If the stick does not want to move in the tube, hold it in your hand and warm it a little, you can move the tube around in your hands. This will warm up the deodorant and unstick it from the sides of the tube, so it starts moving in the package. If the stick tends to sink back to the bottom, squeeze it back up and hold it in place with your fingers placed under the stick.

Always apply the deodorant to clean, washed, dry skin. Place the stick on warm skin for a few seconds to soften it and then rub it all over the armpit. Don’t forget that less is more – a thicker layer doesn’t mean longer protection.

Allow the deodorant to dry and absorb for a few minutes before dressing. Then you are ready to continue your day.

Ingredients: Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beewax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia  (Lavender) Oil, Salvia Sclarea (Clary Sage) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Citral*, Geraniol*,  Linalool*, Limonene*, *Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NURME Natural Deodorant Spearmint and Rosemary 80g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Deodorant
Price: 10.90

The essential oils contained in deodorants have odor-neutralizing properties and, in addition, the baking soda in deodorants prevents the spread of odorous bacteria. Nurme deodorants do not contain clay, which would make the deodorant crumbly, so you do not have to worry about unpleasant crumbling pieces.   • do not contain synthetic dyes or fragrances
  • paraben-free
  • “zero waste” – in addition to the deodorant itself, the packaging that is made out of cardboard, is also environmentally friendly
  • ensures the natural functioning of the body
100% NATURAL and 100% CRUELTY-FREE

How to use: Remove the cap and squeeze the bottom of the tube, so a few centimeters of the deodorant stick comes out. If the stick does not want to move in the tube, hold it in your hand and warm it a little, you can move the tube around in your hands. This will warm up the deodorant and unstick it from the sides of the tube, so it starts moving in the package. If the stick tends to sink back to the bottom, squeeze it back up and hold it in place with your fingers placed under the stick.

Always apply the deodorant to clean, washed, dry skin. Place the stick on warm skin for a few seconds to soften it and then rub it all over the armpit. Don’t forget that less is more – a thicker layer doesn’t mean longer protection.

Allow the deodorant to dry and absorb for a few minutes before dressing. Then you are ready to continue your day.

Ingredients: Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beewax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Mentha viridis (Spearmint) Leaf Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Linalool*, Limonene*, *Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Deodorant
Price: 10.90

The essential oils contained in deodorants have odor-neutralizing properties and, in addition, the baking soda in deodorants prevents the spread of odorous bacteria. Nurme deodorants do not contain clay, which would make the deodorant crumbly, so you do not have to worry about unpleasant crumbling pieces. Ingredients: Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beewax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Citrus Aurantifolia Oil, Pogostemon Cablin (Patchouli) Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Citral*, Geraniol*,  Linalool*, Limonene*, *Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: NURME Natural Deodorant Ylang-Ylang and Bergamot 80g
entry.summary:
Vendor: Nurme
Type: Deodorant
Price: 10.90

The essential oils contained in deodorants have odor-neutralizing properties and, in addition, the baking soda in deodorants prevents the spread of odorous bacteria. Nurme deodorants do not contain clay, which would make the deodorant crumbly, so you do not have to worry about unpleasant crumbling pieces. Also, the deodorant does not leave the underarms greasy, instead, it leaves them feeling is dry and secure.
Ylang-ylang and bergamot give the deodorant a sweet scent.
  • aluminum-free
  • do not contain synthetic dyes or fragrances
  • paraben-free
  • “zero waste” – in addition to the deodorant itself, the packaging that is made out of cardboard, is also environmentally friendly
  • ensures the natural functioning of the body
100% NATURAL and 100% CRUELTY-FREE

How to use: Remove the cap and squeeze the bottom of the tube, so a few centimeters of the deodorant stick comes out. If the stick does not want to move in the tube, hold it in your hand and warm it a little, you can move the tube around in your hands. This will warm up the deodorant and unstick it from the sides of the tube, so it starts moving in the package. If the stick tends to sink back to the bottom, squeeze it back up and hold it in place with your fingers placed under the stick.

Always apply the deodorant to clean, washed, dry skin. Place the stick on warm skin for a few seconds to soften it and then rub it all over the armpit. Don’t forget that less is more – a thicker layer doesn’t mean longer protection.

Allow the deodorant to dry and absorb for a few minutes before dressing. Then you are ready to continue your day.

Ingredients: Zea Mays (Corn) Starch, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Cera Alba (Beewax), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Cananga Odorata (Ylang Ylang) Flower Oil, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia (Bergamot) Leaf Oil, Tocopherol (Vitamin-E), Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Benzyl Alcohol*, Eugenol*, Isoeugenol*, Benzyl Salicylate*, Geraniol* Farnesol*, Linalool*, Benzyl Benzoate * Limonene*, *Occurs naturally in essential oils.

entry.title: HOIA Natural Deodorant With Saaremaa Herbs 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Deodorant
Price: 17.90

The updated formula of the creamy deodorant with Saaremaa herbs contains clay and arrowroot powder to absorb moisture, along with natural active ingredients that effectively prevent the formation of unpleasant body odor.

The deodorant includes:

  • Coconut oil with antibacterial properties
  • Cocoa butter and beeswax to nourish, protect, and moisturize the skin
  • Essential oils to inhibit bacterial growth and keep you feeling fresh

HOIA cream deodorant is 100% natural, free from aluminum, synthetic colors, and fragrances, and is paraben-free. Our brand new cream deodorant allows you to feel fresh throughout the day.

How to use: Apply a small amount of cream deodorant to your armpits using your fingertips and gently massage it into the skin. Store the deodorant away from direct sunlight and store below 25°C.

Ingredients: Maranta Arundinacea Root powder, *Cocos Nucifera oil, *Theobroma Cacao seed butter, Kaolin, *Cera Alba, Sodium Bicarbonate, Triethyl Citrate, Zinc Ricinoleate, Tocopherol, *Salvia Officinalis extract, *Hyssopus Ocinalis Decumbens extract, *Lavendula Angustifolia Leaf oil, **Linalool, **Limonene.

* Organic

** Natural Component of essential oil

entry.title: HOIA Natural Deodorant No Worries 40ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: HOIA
Type: Deodorant
Price: 12.90

The updated natural deodorant NO WORRIES has a mild and fresh scent, glides smoothly on the skin, does not create a thick layer, and thanks to innovative new ingredients, effectively helps reduce both sweating and body odor.

HOIA deodorant NO WORRIES is 100% natural. It contains no aluminum, synthetic dyes, or fragrances and is free from parabens. No Worries deodorant helps you feel fresh all day long.

How to use: Gently push the product up a few millimeters from the bottom with your finger and apply a suitable amount under the armpits. Use several times a day if necessary. Store below 25°C.

Ingredients: *Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, *Cocos Nucifera oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Kaolin, *Maranta Arundinacea Root Extract, Triethyl Citrate, Zinc Ricinolate, Calamine/ Triethoxyocaprylylsilane, *Abies Sibirica Needle oil, Cedrus Atlantica Bark oil, *Lavandula Angustifolia Herb oil, *Rosimarinus Officinalis Leaf oil, *Mentha Piperita Leaf oil, Citrus Limon Peel oil, Natural Aroma, **Limonene,**Linalool.

*Organic

 **Natural component of essential oil

entry.title: LUUV Deodorant Fresh Breeze 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Deodorant
Price: 11.90

LUUV Fresh deodorant with natural deodorizing agents prevents the formation of body odor and keeps you fresh and dry all day long!

Deodorant allows the skin to breathe freely, does not disrupt the skin’s natural functioning, and does not clog pores. Rice starch in the deodorant absorbs sweat, while antibacterial sage extract combats odor-causing bacteria. Moisturizing and soothing aloe vera nourishes delicate underarm skin. The deodorant dries quickly and leaves no stains on your favorite clothes. The blend of green tea and lemon essential oils refreshes and invigorates both body and mind.

Our deodorant is free from aluminum, alcohol, and baking soda, and is 100% vegan!

  • 24h protection
  • Fresh “green” scent
  • Non-irritating
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Moisturizes and soothes
  • Preserves skin’s natural function
  • Free from soda, alcohol, and aluminum

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Dunaliella Salina Extract, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Citrus Nobilis (Mandarin) Peel Oil, Citrus Aurantium (Orange) Peel Oil, Xanthan Gum, Triethyl Citrate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Mica, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Raphanus Sativus (Radish) Root Extract, Citric Acid, Maltodextrin, Parfum, Citral, Limonene, Linalool

entry.title: LUUV Deodorant Lemongrass Green 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Deodorant
Price: 11.90

LUUV Unisex deodorant with natural deodorizing agents prevents the formation of body odor and keeps you fresh and dry all day long!

The unisex deodorant allows the skin to function naturally and does not clog pores. Rice starch in the deodorant absorbs sweat, sage extract combats odor-causing bacteria, and aloe moisturizes and soothes delicate underarm skin. The deodorant dries quickly and does not leave stains on clothes. The fresh blend of essential oils is suitable for both men and women.

The Unisex deodorant is certified with the globally recognized ECOCERT/COSMOS certification, so you can be sure you’re using a product that’s not only good for you but also for our planet. Additionally, it is aluminum-free, alcohol-free, and soda-free, and 100% vegan!

  • 24h protection 
  • Fresh scent that is suitable for both men and women 
  • Non-irritating 
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Moisturizes and soothes
  • Preserves skin’s natural function
  • Free from soda, alcohol, and aluminum

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan | certified

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Ricinoleate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Propanediol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Triethyl Citrate, Polyglyceryl-3-Caprylate, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Citric acid, Citrus Limon Peel (Lemon) Oil, Cymbopogon Flexuosus (Lemongrass) Oil, Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit (Bergamot) Oil, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Limonene, Citral, Linalool, Geraniol

entry.title: LUUV Deodorant Soothing Comfort 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Deodorant
Price: 11.90

LUUV Soothing deodorant with natural deodorizing agents prevents the formation of body odor and absorbs excess sweat. With 24 hours of proven protection, you can feel fresh and energized all day long!

Deodorant does not disrupt the skin’s natural functioning and does not clog pores. Rice starch in the deodorant absorbs sweat, while sage extract has antibacterial properties. Additionally, it contains moisturizing aloe vera, which nourishes and soothes the skin under the arms – an ideal choice for sensitive skin! The deodorant dries quickly and does not leave stains on clothes. The organic and enchanting floral scent refreshes both body and mind.

Soothing deodorant is free from aluminum, alcohol, and baking soda, and is 100% vegan!

  • 24h protection
  • Pleasent mild floral scent
  • Non-irritating
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Moisturizes and soothes
  • Preserves skin’s natural function
  • Free from soda, alcohol and aluminum

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Ricinoleate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Propanediol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Triethyl Citrate,Polyglyceryl-3-Caprylate, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Citric acid, Cymbopogon Martini (Palmarosa) oil, Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Parfum, Geraniol, Linalool, Limonene, Citral

entry.title: LUUV Deodorant Citrus Bliss 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: LUUV
Type: Deodorant
Price: 11.90

Citrus natural deodorant with deodorizing agents that ensure you feel fresh, cheerful, and energized all day long. With 24-hour proven protection against unpleasant odors.

The deodorant allows the skin to breathe freely and does not interfere with its natural functions or clog pores. LUUV's secret weapons are sweat-absorbing rice starch and antibacterial sage extract. Additionally, the deodorant contains moisturizing and soothing aloe vera, gently nurturing underarm skin. The harmonious blend of citrus essential oils creates a delightful scent bouquet.

Dries quickly and leaves no stains on clothes. And best of all, the deodorant is free from aluminum, alcohol, and baking soda, and is 100% vegan!

  • 24h protection
  • Energizing citrus scent
  • Non-irritating
  • Non-comedogenic
  • Moisturizes and soothes
  • Preserves skin’s natural function
  • Free from soda, alcohol, and aluminum

natural | cruelty free | sustainable | paraben free | vegan

The product is made in Estonia

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Zinc Ricinoleate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate,Oryza Sativa (Rice) Starch, Propanediol, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Triethyl Citrate, Polyglyceryl-3-Caprylate, Salvia Officinalis Leaf Extract, Citric acid, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Oil (Orange oil), Glyceryl Caprylate, Benzoic Acid, Xanthan Gum, Parfum, Limonene, Linalool, Citral, Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Hexyl Cinnamal, Geraniol

entry.title: Blokzeep Deodorant Cream - Neutral 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Deodorant
Price: 9.99

Due to the natural ingredients, the Neutral deodorant cream is suitable for everyone. This is a deodorant without perfume or essential oils. The active ingredients in our natural deodorant are corn starch and baking soda. These fabrics absorb moisture naturally and are therefore ideal against perspiration. In addition, it is good for the care and strengthening of your skin.

This natural deodorant cream is sustainable for three reasons:

  • The Deodorant cream is packaged in an aluminum can, which has the highest recycling rate (95%) of all possible packaging. 
  • Stickers on packages are made from PaperWise – agricultural waste.
  • The Deodorant cream contains 100% natural ingredients that are good for you and our planet.
  • The Deodorant cream is handmade and completely Vegan.
  • The Deodorant cream is plastic-free and palm oil-free.

Every Block Soap deodorant is perfume-free and aluminum-free. The deodorant cream contains only natural ingredients, such as baking soda. By using baking soda in deodorants, your skin flora is not disturbed and you prevent your pores from becoming clogged. A can of natural deodorant cream lasts about three months and is ideal for at home and on the go. Due to the handy packaging, the natural deodorant cream is also allowed on the plane and at festivals.

How to use: Apply on armpits as needed.

Ingredients: Zea Mays Starch, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Cocos Nucifera Oil, CI 77947

entry.title: Blokzeep Deodorant cream - Tea tree 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Deodorant
Price: 9.99

Natural deodorant cream Tea Tree is a miracle remedy with versatile properties. In this way, Tea Tree prevents fatty acids from being converted into unpleasant odors, which makes it very suitable as an ingredient in our natural deodorant. In addition, Tea Tree has a disinfectant effect, works against skin conditions and cares for your skin. Furthermore, the active ingredients in the natural deodorant are corn starch and baking soda. These fabrics absorb moisture naturally and are therefore ideal against perspiration.

This natural deodorant cream is sustainable for three reasons:

  • The Deodorant cream is packaged in an aluminum can, which has the highest recycling rate (95%) of all possible packaging. 
  • Stickers on packages are made from PaperWise – agricultural waste.
  • The Deodorant cream contains 100% natural ingredients that are good for you and our planet.

The Deodorant cream is handmade and completely Vegan, it is plastic-free and palm oil-free.

Every Block Soap deodorant is perfume-free and aluminum-free. The deodorant cream contains only natural ingredients, such as baking soda. By using baking soda in deodorants, your skin flora is not disturbed and you prevent your pores from becoming clogged. A can of natural deodorant cream lasts about three months and is ideal for at home and on the go. Due to the handy packaging, the natural deodorant cream is also allowed on the plane and at festivals.

How to use: Apply on armpits as needed.

Ingredients: Zea Mays Starch, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Cocos Nucifera Oil, CI 77947, Melaleuca Alternifo lia Leaf Oil , Limonene

entry.title: Blokzeep Deodorant cream - Grapefruit 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: Blokzeep
Type: Deodorant
Price: 9.99

In addition to the refreshing scent, Grapefruit has antibacterial and antiseptic effects and is therefore very suitable for regulating sweat. In addition, Grapefruit oil has astringent and detoxifying properties and is good for firming the skin. The combination of the wonderful scent of Grapefruit and its positive properties makes Grapefruit very suitable for our natural cream deodorant. Furthermore, the active ingredients in our natural deodorant are corn starch and baking soda. These fabrics absorb moisture naturally and are therefore ideal against perspiration. 

This natural deodorant cream is sustainable for three reasons:

  • The Deodorant cream is packaged in an aluminum can, which has the highest recycling rate (95%) of all possible packaging. 
  • Stickers on packages are made from PaperWise – agricultural waste.
  • The Deodorant cream contains 100% natural ingredients that are good for you and our planet.

The Deodorant cream is handmade and completely Vegan, it is plastic-free and palm oil-free.

Every Block Soap deodorant is perfume-free and aluminum-free. The deodorant cream contains only natural ingredients, such as baking soda. By using baking soda in deodorants, your skin flora is not disturbed and you prevent your pores from becoming clogged. A can of natural deodorant cream lasts about three months and is ideal for at home and on the go. Due to the handy packaging, the natural deodorant cream is also allowed on the plane and at festivals.

How to use: Apply on armpits as needed.

Ingredients: Zea Mays Starch, Butyrospermum Parkii Butter, Sodium Bicarbonate, Cocos Nucifera Oil, CI 77947, Citrus Paradisi Peel Oil, Limonene, Linalool, Citral

entry.title: MÁDARA Herbal Deodorant 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: MADARA
Type: Deodorant
Price: 13.90

This quick-drying deodorant with Northern sage and natural minerals reduces odour and provides all-day freshness. Quickly-absorbing formula leaves no stains on the clothes.

How to use: Apply to clean underarms. Use daily.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Potassium Alum, Rosa Damascena (Rose) Flower Water, Alcohol, Chondrus Crispus (Irish moss) powder, Aroma, Calendula Officinalis (Calendula) Flower Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Camomile) Flower Extract, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Leaf Extract, Salvia Officinalis (Salvia) Leaf Extract, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Limonene, Linalool, Geraniol, Citronellol, Citral

COSMOS NATURAL certified

Please note that ingredient lists may change and slightly vary from time to time. You will always find the most up-to-date information on the actual product packaging.

entry.title: Deodorant Cosmébio Without Aluminum Salts Without Alcohol Without Parabens 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: FUN!ETHIC
Type: Deodorant
Price: 6.90

The natural and certified organic “Avoir 20 Ans” alcohol-free roll-on deodorant has been tested effective for 24 hours. It is also free of aluminum salts and parabens. The aloe vera contained in the treatment makes it very moisturizing, it is ideal after hair removal to avoid redness. Its antibacterial active ingredients prevent appearance of post-depilatory pimples. Its small ball allows it to be applied precisely and it does not stain clothes. 

It is suitable for all skin types. Its creamy texture and very light 100% natural orange blossom fragrance will delight you every day.

How to use: The “Avoir 20 Ans” deodorant is used in the morning and/or evening after a shower on clean, dry skin, applying gently under the armpits. Repeat the application during the day when you feel the need.

Ingredients: Aqua, hordeum vulgare stem water*, caprylic/capric triglycerides, triethyl citrate, cetearyl alcohol, glyceryl stearate, glycerin, stearic acid, prunus persica juice, aloe vera barbadensis powder*, tocopherol, helianthus annuus seed oil, salvia officinalis (sage) oil , sodium caproyl/lauroyl lactyl lactate, sodium lauroyl glutamate, xanthan gum, citric acid, sodium benzoate, potassium sorbate, benzyl alcohol, dehydroacetic acid, fragrance, linalool, limonene, geraniol, citral.

* Ingredient from Organic Farming
** Processed from ingredients from Organic Farming

Made in France.

  • 99.5% natural ingredients, 12.9% from organic farming and mainly from fair trade
  • All raw materials processed in France
  • Deodorant made in France (Alsace)
  • No controversial ingredients, 100% good for your skin and the enivironment
  • Total absence of palm oil and its derivatives
  • Packaging: 100% recycled and recyclable bottle made in Europe
